blended.narrative: Horseshoe Resort is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 52°F.
Wednesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
